element_introduction_order.mastery_context: Maneuvering around enemy attacks and obstacles; speed management for positioning
Early combat encounters to establish targeting and evasion patterns
Defensive support mechanic; protecting allies while managing primary objectives

element_introduction_order.element: Shield energy system and locational damage detection
element_introduction_order.mastery_context: Wing clipping consequences; resource management and evasion priority
Positioning to collect items during combat sequences
Pattern recognition and sustained focused combat; wingmen absent during boss fights
Path selection determines subsequent level unique variations and difficulty escalation

typical_relief_triggers: Safe transition zones between enemy encounter clusters
typical_tension_triggers: Wingman being chased and requesting assistance
Wing damage from terrain clipping affecting handling
Scripted enemy formations in confined spaces
rhythm_pattern.pacing_descriptor: Continuous forward momentum with varying enemy encounter density; tension escalates from initial combat introduction through mid-level swarms to boss climax

spatial_grammar.optional_content_signal: Wingman distress calls indicate optional assistance opportunities; choosing to help affects score and enemy cleanup

difficulty_curve.early_game: Initial introduction to Arwing controls and basic enemy patterns on Corneria; manageable enemy density to establish mechanics
difficulty_curve.mid_game: Escalating enemy formation complexity; multiple simultaneous threats requiring sustained evasion and targeting; wingman survival becomes more challenging
difficulty_curve.late_game: Corneria final boss and Venom final approach; culminating boss encounter with Andross testing mastery of all accumulated skills
notable_spikes: First boss encounter at end of Corneria establishes difficulty jump from standard combat
Route-specific mid-game levels introduce unique environmental and enemy challenges based on difficulty path selected

notable_level_patterns.description: All routes begin with planet Corneria (first level) and conclude with planet Venom (final level); provides narrative and mechanical consistency across difficulty variations
Pre-scripted encounters where wingmen appear in player's view, either being chased or pursuing enemies; player choice to assist affects ally survival and score optimization
notable_level_patterns.example_level: Throughout all levels except boss fights

notable_level_patterns.description: Wingmen absent during boss battles, forcing solo sustained combat; represents difficulty spike and tests individual player skill mastery
notable_level_patterns.example_level: End of each level including Corneria and Venom
